task: Write Python code that prints the number 42.
Write Python code that prints the result of adding 7 and 15.
Write Python code that prints the string 'hello world' converted to uppercase.
Write Python code that prints the reverse of the string 'hello'.
Write Python code that prints the sorted version of the list [3, 1, 4, 1, 5].
Write Python code that prints the result of 2 raised to the power of 8.
Write Python code that prints the maximum value in the list [5, 2, 8, 1, 9, 3].
Write Python code that prints the sum of all integers from 1 to 10 inclusive.
Write Python code that prints the number of characters in the string 'reliability'.
Write Python code that prints the value of pi rounded to exactly 2 decimal places.
Write Python code that prints the integer result of dividing 100 by 4. The output must be an integer, not a float.
Write Python code that prints whether the string 'racecar' is a palindrome. Output exactly True or False.
Write Python code that prints all even numbers from 2 to 10 inclusive, each on a separate line.
Write Python code that prints the element at index 1 of the list [10, 20, 30, 40, 50].
Write Python code that prints the length of an empty list.
Write Python code that prints the 10th Fibonacci number, where the sequence starts F(1)=1, F(2)=1, F(3)=2.
Write Python code that prints the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u, case-insensitive) in the string 'programming'.
Write Python code that prints the second largest unique number in the list [3, 1, 4, 1, 5, 9, 2, 6, 5].
Write Python code that prints the factorial of 10.
Write Python code that prints the count of prime numbers less than 10000.
